name: DICOM_ContentItemValueTypes
title: DICOM® Content Item Value Type
description: DICOM® Content Item Value Type extracted from (DICOM Part 3 section C.17.2-1)[https://dicom.nema.org/medical/dicom/current/output/chtml/part03/sect_C.17.3.2.html#sect_C.17.3.2.1].

concept.display: Type of text, e.g., 'Findings', or name of identifier, e.g., 'Lesion ID'
Type of numeric value or measurement, e.g., 'BPD'
concept.definition: Numeric value and associated Unit of Measurement

concept.display: Type of DateTime, e.g., 'Date/Time of onset'
Type of UID, e.g 'Study Instance UID'

concept.definition: Reference to UIDs of Composite SOP Instances
Reference to UIDs of Image Composite SOP Instances
Reference to UIDs of Waveform Composite SOP Instances

concept.display: Document Title or document section heading. Concept Name conveys the Document Title (if the CONTAINER is the Document Root Content Item) or the category of observation.
concept.definition: The content of the CONTAINER. The value of a CONTAINER Content Item is the collection of Content Items that it contains.
